name: Crispy Peanut Butter Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the crunchy peanut butter and margarine.
2. Mix until well blended.
3. Gradually add the confectioner's sugar and mix until smooth.
4. Add the crispy rice cereal and stir until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
5. Form the mixture into 3/4-inch balls.
6. Dip each ball in dipping chocolate.
Makes about 75 centers. Jo Merrill
